title: The easy fix for F1’s biggest 2026 problem explained
summary: Formula 1 is facing a major problem. Today, we’ll show you what the solution could be. We show how drivers suddenly lose speed on the straights due to energy management, how the MGU-K and battery work together, and why this leads to an unnatural driving style and dangerous situations, as seen during the Japanese Grand Prix.
